title: Result - Greece
content:
Welcome to Greece, a southeastern European gem comprising the southern Balkan mainland, the Peloponnese peninsula and around 6,000 islands and islets.
Its diverse landscape invites you to hike lush forests, discover lakes and waterfalls, or explore sea caves, parks and volcanoes across the Aegean and Ionian Seas. With over 250 sunny days annually and 16,000 kilometres of coastline, Greece boasts world-renowned "Blue Flag" beaches for their quality and beauty. Dive into history at Athens’ Acropolis, Roman ruins in Thessaloniki, or unwind with Mykonos’s beaches and nightlife. Greece offers endless adventures in one of the world’s favorite destinations.

## Unique food tradition
Spanakopita: a savory pie filled with spinach and feta cheese wrapped in flaky phyllo pastry.
Greece is undergoing a profound digital transformation through a multifaceted plan to fully digitize the country.

### Local legend or myth
Persephone: her abduction by Hades to the underworld explains the seasons, with spring and summer marking her return to the earth.

### Language of the Land
Greek has the longest recorded history of any Indo-European language, with written records going back more than 3,400 years.
islands and islets are scattered across the Greek Seas and 227 of them are inhabited.
